untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of: (1) 'last bearish candle' in a sequence - requires historical candle color pattern matching not supported by allowed operators; (2) 'support levels' detection (floor pivot levels, MA slope direction, previous day close) - requires multi-condition logic and MA slope analysis beyond allowed operators; (3) 'confirmation via another candle of same color' - requires sequential candle pattern recognition. These require lookback window analysis and pattern detection capabilities not available in the allowed indicator and operator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core long entry above prior high with bullish confirmation (positive body), and exit on MA crossdown as reversal. However, the original signal's complexity around support level detection, multi-candle pattern sequencing, and bearish-to-bullish transition identification cannot be adequately expressed with the available indicators and operators without significant signal degradation.
